label: Al-Shabaab South-Central Corridor
notes: Principal Al-Shabaab movement corridor from Middle Jubba through Bay region to central Somalia; used for logistics, reinforcement, and tax collection

label: SNA Main Supply Route: Mogadishu–Baidoa
notes: Primary SNA logistics axis between capital and Southwest State; frequently targeted by Al-Shabaab IEDs and ambushes

label: SNA 2022 Offensive Axis: Mogadishu–Beledweyne
notes: Primary axis of advance for 2022 SNA/Macawisley Hiiraan offensive; route up Shabelle River valley

label: KDF Supply Corridor: Kenya Border–Kismayo
notes: Kenya Defence Forces logistics route from Kenyan border to Kismayo; critical for KDF ATMIS operations in Jubbaland

label: MV Ruen Mother-Ship Patrol Area (2023–24)
notes: Area of operations for pirate mother ship MV Ruen after hijacking Nov 2023; used for further attacks before Indian Navy retook vessel Mar 2024

label: Gulf of Aden International Shipping Lane
notes: Critical global shipping corridor; ~20,000 vessels/year; primary target of Somali piracy 2008-2012 and resurgence 2023-24

label: WFP Aid Corridor: Mogadishu–Bay Region
notes: World Food Programme and NGO aid supply route to drought-affected Bay and Bakool regions; negotiated access with armed actors required

label: Al-Shabaab Coastal Arms Smuggling Route
notes: Suspected arms smuggling route from Barawe coastal area toward Mogadishu hinterland; documented by UN Monitoring Group

label: SNA Axis: Kismayo–Baidoa
notes: SNA and KDF ATMIS operational axis connecting Jubbaland coast to Bay Region; key for coordinating southwest operations

label: IDP Displacement Flow: South Somalia–Mogadishu
notes: Primary displacement corridor; hundreds of thousands of IDPs fled conflict and drought in Lower Shabelle and Bay/Bakool toward Mogadishu settlements

label: ENDF Logistics: Ethiopia–Beledweyne Corridor
notes: Ethiopian military supply route from Ethiopia border through Hiiraan to Beledweyne; used by ENDF AMISOM/ATMIS contingent

label: Charcoal Export Route (UN Banned)
notes: Al-Shabaab charcoal export route via coastal dhows to Gulf states (UAE, Oman); banned under UNSC Resolution 2036 but documented violation by UN Monitoring Group

label: Maritime Supply: Mogadishu–Kismayo
notes: Maritime logistics route between Mogadishu and Kismayo; supplementary to overland routes and critical when roads are threatened by Al-Shabaab

label: EU NAVFOR Atalanta Patrol Zone
notes: EU NAVFOR counter-piracy patrol area covering Gulf of Aden and western Indian Ocean; WFP convoy escort missions also conducted within this zone

label: Al-Shabaab Kenya Border Infiltration
notes: Al-Shabaab cross-border movement corridor; used for attacks in Kenya's Northeast Province and to recruit Kenyan fighters (including for Westgate and Garissa attacks)
